## Context

The `@kody taskify --file docs/test-prd.md` command is already implemented in `@kody-ade/engine`. The test input `docs/test-prd.md` already exists with 3 dependent tasks (User model → login/register endpoints → auth middleware). The verification task is to run the command in local mode, read the resulting `taskify-result.json`, and assert each acceptance criterion is met.

---

## Implementation

### Step 1: Run `@kody taskify --file docs/test-prd.md` in local mode
